rationale: The citing paper explicitly centers on decomposing marketing effects into acquisition versus acceleration and uses an agent-based diffusion framework, which closely overlaps with the cited paper’s core contribution of decomposing WOM seeding value into expansion versus acceleration using agent-based simulations. Given this strong construct/method alignment and the direct DOI match (10.1509/jmr.11.0305), the citation is plausibly a substantive mechanism or conceptual source rather than an incidental mention.
